text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I didn't misread the time. Or put on someone
else's shoes. Or trip over...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And yet, I've reached the academy gates,
accident-free!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But wh-what if this is a bad omen? Like... a really
big accident is on its way?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can see myself bumping into someone... and
giving them a nasty injury.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A-and what if that injury stops them from
pursuing their dreams, and their life is ruined
forever?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uugh... I'm so s-sorry... I offer the rest of my life
for atonement. Ngh...

Meisho Doto's fictional pandemonium pulls her
into despair.
